name: TTime
protocol: Oral enclomiphene daily — dosing determined at consultation
notes: Telemedicine-based. Ongoing provider support included with subscription.

name: Maximus Tribe
labs_required: At-home lab kit shipped with first order

name: Hone Health
protocol: Variable oral enclomiphene; dosing set by prescribing physician
labs_required: Full hormone panel plus metabolic workup
delivery: Specialty pharmacy, 2–5 business days after approval
notes: Broad evaluation covers multiple hormone markers.
